subject: grammar
title: First and Second Conditionals
instruction: Fill in the gaps in the extracts below using the verbs in brackets in the correct form.
passage:
1 My parents would love it if I 1 [1] (become) a doctor but I'm not sure I'd be able to face all those years of study. Also if I 2 [2] (be) a doctor, I 3 [3] (hate) all those hours you have to work.

2 These days I use the Internet more and more to do my shopping. If I 4 [4] (not/have) my computer, I 5 [5] (not/know) what to do. I buy clothes, books and DVDs online as well as holidays. If you 6 [6] (not/find) what you want in the shops, you 7 [7] (find) it on the Internet. I'm going to Barcelona in a few weeks and I'm going to buy my ticket on the Internet because it 8 [8] (save) me about £50 if I 9 [9] (do) it that way.

3 This production of Shakespeare's play 10 [10] (surprise) you, unless you 11 [11] (be used to) seeing all the characters being played by just two people!

4 Eggs are best kept at a cool room temperature, so I don't keep my eggs in the fridge. If I 12 [12] (keep) them in the fridge I 13 [13] (take) them out half an hour before cooking. However, not everyone has somewhere cool to keep eggs. If you 14 [14] (not/have) a cool place to store them in your home, you 15 [15] (have to) use the fridge, but just remember to take them out in time.
